reports.name: Sales performance
reports.description: Revenue trend, top customers by volume, and invoice status breakdown — rolling 6 months.

reports.name: AR aging
reports.description: Accounts receivable split into aging buckets: current, 1–30, 31–60, 61–90, and 90+ days overdue.

tables: all open invoices with days overdue column, sorted worst first
aiHints.compute: derive aging bucket from DocDueDate vs today — do not expect it from SL

reports.name: Inventory levels
reports.description: Stock on hand by item and warehouse, with reorder alerts for items below minimum level.

charts: stock level bar — top 15 items by value
tables: below-minimum items highlighted in red, with OnHand / MinLevel / gap columns

reports.name: Purchase & vendor spend
reports.description: PO volume and vendor spend breakdown for the last 6 months.

tables: top vendors aggregated with PO count and total

reports.name: Open sales orders
reports.description: Delivery backlog showing open sales orders, days late, and fulfillment priority.

charts: backlog by due-week bar (overdue in red)
tables: all open orders sorted by days late descending
aiHints.compute: derive days late from DocDueDate vs today

reports.name: AP payment schedule
reports.description: Vendor invoices coming due in the next 7, 14, and 30 days, plus overdue items.

tables: all open AP invoices sorted by due date
aiHints.compute: outstanding = DocTotal - PaidToDate; days to due = DocDueDate vs today

reports.name: Credit limit exposure
reports.description: Customers approaching or exceeding their credit limit, showing exposure (AR balance + open orders + open deliveries) vs. credit limit.

charts: exposure vs limit grouped bar — top 10
tables: all customers with credit limits sorted by utilization % descending
aiHints.compute: exposure = CurrentAccountBalance + OpenOrdersBalance + OpenDeliveryNotesBalance; utilization = exposure / CreditLimit × 100

reports.name: Gross margin by customer
reports.description: Customer profitability analysis showing revenue, cost, gross profit, and margin % — with flags for customers below threshold.

queries.sql: SELECT T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", SUM(T1."LineTotal") AS "Revenue", SUM(T1."GrossBuyPr" * T1."Quantity") AS "TotalCost", SUM(T1."GrssProfit") AS "GrossProfit" FROM OINV T0 INNER JOIN INV1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry" WHERE T0."CANCELED" = 'N' AND T0."DocDate" >= '{date_6m_ago}' GROUP BY T0."CardCode", T0."CardName" ORDER BY SUM(T1."LineTotal") DESC

charts: revenue vs cost stacked bar — top 10
tables: all customers sorted by margin % ascending
aiHints.compute: margin % = GrossProfit / Revenue × 100; requires SQLQueries endpoint

reports.name: Quotation pipeline
reports.description: Open quotations not yet converted to orders, with age in days, expiry tracking, and total pipeline value.

tables: all open quotations sorted by expiry date ascending
aiHints.compute: age = today - DocDate; expiry = ValidUntil vs today

reports.name: Returns & credit notes
reports.description: AR credit notes issued in the last 6 months, grouped by customer and month, with return trends and repeat offenders.

tables: all credit notes sorted by date descending
aiHints.notes: DocumentLines contain BaseType/BaseEntry/BaseLine linking back to original invoice (BaseType=13)

reports.name: Slow-moving inventory
reports.description: Items with stock on hand but zero or near-zero sales activity in the last 90+ days, showing tied-up capital and dead stock.

queries.sql: SELECT T0."ItemCode", T0."ItemName", T0."OnHand", T0."AvgPrice", T0."LastPurPrc" AS "LastPurchasePrice", (SELECT MAX(T1."DocDate") FROM INV1 T1 INNER JOIN OINV T2 ON T1."DocEntry" = T2."DocEntry" WHERE T1."ItemCode" = T0."ItemCode" AND T2."CANCELED" = 'N') AS "LastSaleDate" FROM OITM T0 WHERE T0."OnHand" > 0 AND T0."InvntItem" = 'Y' ORDER BY "LastSaleDate" ASC

charts: tied-up capital by idle period bar
tables: all slow items sorted by days since last sale descending
aiHints.compute: stock value = OnHand × AvgPrice; days idle = today - LastSaleDate; requires SQLQueries endpoint for LastSaleDate subquery
